subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The tale of Husayn hath verily returned, for in the midst of tribulation He calleth them that dwell in the realm of creation unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قد رجع حدیث الحسین انه فی بحبوحه البلاء یدعو من فی ملکوت الانشاء الی
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
